phrases.intent_en: Ask where Piazza della Signoria is
phrases.cultural_note: Piazza della Signoria is Florence's main civic square and home to an outdoor sculpture gallery including a copy of Michelangelo's David.

responses.english: Straight along Via dei Calzaiuoli, five minutes.
responses.phonetic: DREET-toh per VEE-ah day kal-tsah-YOO-oh-lee, CHEEN-kweh mee-NOO-tee.
responses.local: Dritto per Via dei Calzaiuoli, cinque minuti.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the leather market is
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è il mercato del cuoio?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH eel mer-KAH-toh del KWOH-yoh?

responses.english: At the San Lorenzo Market, ten minutes away.
responses.phonetic: al mer-KAH-toh dee san loh-REN-tsoh, ah DYEH-chee mee-NOO-tee.
responses.local: Al Mercato di San Lorenzo, a dieci minuti.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the best gelato
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove fanno il gelato migliore qui vicino?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh FAN-noh eel jeh-LAH-toh meel-YOH-reh kwee vee-CHEE-noh?

responses.english: At Gelateria dei Neri, on Via dei Neri.
responses.phonetic: dah jeh-lah-teh-REE-ah day NEH-ree, een VEE-ah day NEH-ree.
responses.local: Da Gelateria dei Neri, in Via dei Neri.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which bus goes to the train station
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quale autobus va alla stazione?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAH-leh ow-toh-BOOS vah AL-lah stah-TSYOH-neh?

responses.english: Line C2, the stop is right there.
responses.phonetic: lah LEE-neh-ah chee DOO-eh, lah fer-MAH-tah eh lee.
responses.local: La linea C2, la fermata è lì.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the Uffizi requires booking in advance
phrases.text_local: Scusi, per gli Uffizi serve la prenotazione?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, per lyee oof-FEE-tsee SER-veh lah preh-noh-tah-TSYOH-neh?
